LanguageData.Ammo_8x22mmNambu_Miho.label: 8x22mm Nambu cartridge (AP-IM)
LanguageData.Ammo_8x22mmNambu_Miho.description: Low caliber handgun cartridge lacking in stopping power.
LanguageData.Ammo_65x50mmSRArisaka_Miho.label: 6.5x50mmSR cartridge (AP-IM)
LanguageData.Ammo_65x50mmSRArisaka_Miho.description: Semi-rimmed, intermediate rifle cartridge found mostly in outdated bolt-action firearms.
LanguageData.Ammo_77x58mmArisaka_Miho.label: 7.7x58mm Arisaka cartridge (AP-IM)
LanguageData.Ammo_77x58mmArisaka_Miho.description: Large rifle bullet found mostly in outdated bolt-action firearms.
LanguageData.Ammo_132x92mmSRTuF_Miho.label: 13.2x92mmSR TuF cartridge (AP-IM)
LanguageData.Ammo_132x92mmSRTuF_Miho.description: Outdated large caliber bullet used in anti-materiel rifles.
LanguageData.Ammo_20x42mm_Miho.label: 20x42mm (AP-IM)
LanguageData.Ammo_20x42mm_Miho.description: Specialized cartridge developed for use in shoulder-fired grenade launchers.
LanguageData.Fragment_Large_Miho.label: large fragments
LanguageData.Fragment_Small_Miho.label: small fragments

LanguageData.Bullet_20x42mm_Miho.label: 20x42mm bullet (AP-I)
LanguageData.Ammo_47x398mmR_Miho.label: 47x398mmR cartridge (AP-IM)
LanguageData.Ammo_47x398mmR_Miho.description: Large caliber shell used by tank guns.
LanguageData.Ammo_57x280mmR_Canister.label: 57x280mmR cartridge (Canister)
LanguageData.Ammo_57x280mmR_Canister.description: Large caliber shell used by tank guns.
LanguageData.Ammo_57x280mmR_Thermobaric.label: 57x280mmR cartridge (Thermobaric)
LanguageData.Ammo_57x280mmR_Thermobaric.description: Large caliber shell used by tank guns.
LanguageData.Bullet_47x398mmR_Miho.label: 47x398mmR bullet (AP-IM)
LanguageData.Bullet_57x280mmR_Canister.label: 57x280mmR canister flechette
LanguageData.Bullet_57x280mmR_Thermobaric.label: 57x280mmR bullet (Thermobaric)
LanguageData.Ammo_Miho100mm_Incendiary.label: 100mm Artillery Rocket (Incendiary)
LanguageData.Ammo_Miho100mm_Incendiary.description: An unguided rocket equipped with an explosive warhead and a contact fuse.
LanguageData.Bullet_Miho100mm_Incendiary.label: 100mm Rocket (Incendiary)
